description: Evidence about m=0 sausage instability scaling, sheared-flow stabilization thresholds, and downstream confinement outcomes in Z-pinches.

open_questions.question: The field appears to agree about m=0 sausage growth and shear-flow stabilization. What experiment or derivation would actually change this consensus?

suggested_next_steps.description: Identify a measurement that, if it landed at a value contrary to the current consensus, would force a rewrite within the group.
suggested_next_steps.title: Counter-experiment proposal

scope.framework: MHD literature; experiment; linear and numerical MHD; linear ideal MHD eigenmode analysis
scope.system: ZaP Z-pinch experiment; magnetized plasma; sheared-flow Z-pinch

title: m=0 sausage growth and shear-flow stabilization
